zh.Pakenham, Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, En: 英國英格蘭素福爾可帕克南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cage於大約1485年出生在英國素福爾可帕克南時，他的父親Robert Cage42歲，母親Katherine37歲。他於大約1513年與Lady Elizabeth Parker在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1542年在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕克南享年58歲。

zh-hans.Pakenham, Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, En: 英国英格兰素福爾可帕克南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cage于大约1485年出生在英国素福爾可帕克南时，他的父亲Robert Cage42岁，母亲Katherine37岁。他于大约1513年与Lady Elizabeth Parker在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1542年在英国英格兰素福爾可帕克南享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from Middle English, Old French cage ‘cage, enclosure’ (from Latin cavea ‘container, cave’), denoting someone who lived by or was the keeper of a cage, in the sense ‘lock-up, prison for petty offenders’.
English: alternatively, a variant of   Keech  .

variants.name: Keech
meanings: nickname for an fat person, from Middle English cach, caiche, cage, kech, a word of unexplained origin but presumably the antecedent of modern English dialect keech (variant catch) ‘lump of congealed fat; fat of a slaughtered animal rolled up into a lump (in preparation for sending to the chandler or tallow maker to make wax)’.
variant of Kedge, a nickname either from Middle English kegge, kigge ‘cheerful, pleasant, agreeable, merry’, or from an unrecorded Middle English kegge ‘belly’, for a pot-bellied person.

variants.name: Cager
meanings: English (Sussex): occupational name for a maker of cages or a jailer, Middle English cager (from Old French cagier), an agent derivative of Cage .
English: alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived by a cage, equivalent to atte Cage (see Cage ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cage was born about 1485, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Cage, was 42 and his mother, Katherine, was 37. He married Lady Elizabeth Parker about 1513, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1542, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Cage est né environ 1485, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cage, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Parker environ 1513, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1542, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Cage um 1485 in Pakenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Cage 42 und seine Mutter Katherine 37. Er hat um 1513 in Suffolk, England Lady Elizabeth Parker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1542 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cage è nato il circa 1485 nel Pakenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Cage, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Katherine, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Parker circa 1513, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1542, nel Pakenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Pakenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクプアケンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cageが約1485年にイギリススフォルクプアケンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Cageは42歳，母Katherineは37歳であった。約1513年にイギリススフォルクでLady Elizabeth Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1542年にイギリスイギリススフォルクプアケンハムで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cage(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 수폴크 팍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cage(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1513년 영국 수폴크에서 Lady Elizabeth Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 팍함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cage nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cage, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Katherine, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Parker aproximadamente 1513, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1542, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cage родился около 1485 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cage было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Parker около 1513 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1542 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Cage nació aproximadamente 1485, en Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cage, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Katherine, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Parker aproximadamente 1513, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1542, en Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
